# Data Model: LoadUp Frontend Web Application

**Generated by**: `/speckit.plan`  
**Date**: 2026-05-11  
**Feature**: 002-web-app

All types below map to the LoadUp REST API response shapes. These are the TypeScript interfaces that will live in `src/types/`.

---

## Core Entities

### User

```ts
// src/types/user.ts
export interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  timezone?: string;
  createdAt: string;
}

export interface AuthResponse {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  token: string;
  expiresIn: number;
  createdAt: string;
}

export interface LoginPayload {
  email: string;
  password: string;
}

export interface RegisterPayload {
  name: string;
  email: string;
  password: string;
}
```

---

### Training Sheet

```ts
// src/types/trainingSheet.ts
export type DayOfWeek =
  | "monday"
  | "tuesday"
  | "wednesday"
  | "thursday"
  | "friday"
  | "saturday"
  | "sunday";

export type DayType = "training" | "rest";

export type SeriesType = "warm-up" | "adjustment" | "working";

export interface Series {
  type: SeriesType;
  reps: number;
}

export interface Exercise {
  _id: string;
  name: string;
  muscleGroup: MuscleGroup;
  series: Series[];
}

export interface TrainingDay {
  dayOfWeek: DayOfWeek;
  type: DayType;
  exercises: Exercise[];
}

export interface TrainingSheet {
  _id: string;
  userId: string;
  days: TrainingDay[];
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
}

export type MuscleGroup =
  | "Peito"
  | "Tríceps"
  | "Costas"
  | "Bíceps"
  | "Ombros"
  | "Abdômen"
  | "Perna"
  | "Glúteo";

export interface CreateExercisePayload {
  name: string;
  muscleGroup: MuscleGroup;
  series: Series[];
}

export interface UpdateExercisePayload {
  name?: string;
  muscleGroup?: MuscleGroup;
  series?: Series[];
}
```

---

### Training Session

```ts
// src/types/trainingSession.ts
export type SessionStatus = "pending" | "completed" | "skipped";

export interface LoggedSet {
  _id: string;
  exerciseName: string;
  seriesType: SeriesType;
  seriesOrder: number;
  weight: number;
  repsCompleted: number;
  restTime: number;
}

export interface TrainingSession {
  _id: string;
  userId: string;
  date: string; // ISO 8601 date string
  status: SessionStatus;
  loggedSets: LoggedSet[];
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
}

export interface AddRecordPayload {
  exerciseName: string;
  seriesType: SeriesType;
  seriesOrder: number;
  weight: number;
  repsCompleted: number;
  restTime: number;
}

export interface UpdateRecordPayload {
  exerciseName?: string;
  seriesType?: SeriesType;
  seriesOrder?: number;
  weight?: number;
  repsCompleted?: number;
  restTime?: number;
}

export interface CompleteSessionPayload {
  status: "completed" | "skipped";
}
```

---

### Calendar

```ts
// src/types/calendar.ts
export type CalendarDayStatus = "completed" | "skipped" | "pending" | "rest";

export interface CalendarDay {
  date: string; // YYYY-MM-DD
  dayOfWeek: DayOfWeek;
  type: DayType;
  status: CalendarDayStatus;
  sessionId?: string;
}

export interface TodayCalendar {
  date: string;
  dayOfWeek: DayOfWeek;
  type: DayType;
  status: CalendarDayStatus;
  exercises: Exercise[];
  sessionId?: string;
}

export interface MonthlyCalendar {
  year: number;
  month: number; // 1–12
  days: CalendarDay[];
}

export interface WeeklyCalendar {
  weekStart: string;
  weekEnd: string;
  days: CalendarDay[];
}
```

---

### Progression

```ts
// src/types/progression.ts
export interface ProgressionPoint {
  date: string; // YYYY-MM-DD
  weight: number;
  reps: number;
  sessionId: string;
}

export interface ExerciseChart {
  exerciseName: string;
  data: ProgressionPoint[];
}

export interface PersonalRecord {
  exerciseName: string;
  weight: number;
  reps: number;
  date: string;
}

export interface ProgressionSummary {
  currentStreak: number;
  longestStreak: number;
  totalSessions: number;
  personalRecords: PersonalRecord[];
}
```

---

## State Transitions

### Training Day Status (Calendar)

```
[rest day]     → always "rest" regardless of session
[training day] → "pending" (no session yet on this date)
[training day] → "completed" (session.status = 'completed')
[training day] → "skipped" (session.status = 'skipped')
```

### Session Status

```
created → pending (default)
pending → completed (user taps "Finish Session")
pending → skipped (user taps "Skip Session")
```

---

## Validation Rules

| Field                     | Rule                                                 |
| ------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- |
| `name`                    | Non-empty string, required                           |
| `email`                   | Valid email format, required                         |
| `password`                | Minimum 6 characters, required                       |
| `exercise.name`           | Non-empty string, max 100 chars                      |
| `exercise.muscleGroup`    | Must be one of the 8 defined MuscleGroup values      |
| `series.reps`             | Integer ≥ 1                                          |
| `loggedSet.weight`        | Float ≥ 0.5, ≤ 500 (kg); 0 not valid per backend DTO |
| `loggedSet.repsCompleted` | Integer ≥ 0, ≤ 1000                                  |
| `loggedSet.restTime`      | Integer ≥ 0, ≤ 600 (seconds)                         |
| `loggedSet.seriesOrder`   | Integer ≥ 1                                          |

---

## Theme Types

```ts
// src/styles/theme.ts
export interface AppTheme {
  colors: {
    primary: string;
    primaryContainer: string;
    primaryGradient: string;
    surface: string;
    background: string;
    onPrimary: string;
    onSurface: string;
    onSurfaceMuted: string;
    onBackground: string;
    onBackgroundMuted: string;
    onBackgroundSubtle: string;
    glassOverlay: string;
    outline: string;
    outlineVariant: string;
    error: string;
    errorContainer: string;
    success: string;
    successContainer: string;
    muscleGroups: Record<MuscleGroup, { bg: string; text: string }>;
  };
  typography: {
    displayLarge: { fontSize: string; fontWeight: number };
    headlineMedium: { fontSize: string; fontWeight: number };
    titleLarge: { fontSize: string; fontWeight: number };
    titleMedium: { fontSize: string; fontWeight: number };
    bodyMedium: { fontSize: string; fontWeight: number };
    labelLarge: { fontSize: string; fontWeight: number };
    labelSmall: { fontSize: string; fontWeight: number };
  };
  spacing: {
    xs: string;
    sm: string;
    md: string;
    lg: string;
    xl: string;
    xxl: string;
  };
  borderRadius: {
    card: string;
    inner: string;
    header: string;
    chip: string;
    pill: string;
    avatar: string;
  };
  shadows: {
    card: string;
    primary: string;
  };
}
```

---

## Naming Conventions for `src/types/`

| File                 | Contents                                                                                            |
| -------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `user.ts`            | User, AuthResponse, LoginPayload, RegisterPayload                                                   |
| `trainingSheet.ts`   | TrainingSheet, TrainingDay, Exercise, Series, MuscleGroup, DayOfWeek, DayType, SeriesType, payloads |
| `trainingSession.ts` | TrainingSession, LoggedSet, SessionStatus, payloads                                                 |
| `calendar.ts`        | CalendarDay, TodayCalendar, MonthlyCalendar, WeeklyCalendar, CalendarDayStatus                      |
| `progression.ts`     | ExerciseChart, ProgressionPoint, ProgressionSummary, PersonalRecord                                 |
| `index.ts`           | Re-exports all types for clean imports                                                              |
